description: Add a theme toggle button in navbar to switch between dark and light modes

step1.title: Create Theme Context
step1.description: Setup theme management with React Context
instructions: This creates a context to manage theme state across the app

step2.title: Wrap App with ThemeProvider
step2.description: Add ThemeProvider to the root of your application
instructions: Open your main App.tsx or main.tsx file
Make sure it wraps all other providers and components

step3.title: Create Theme Toggle Button Component
step3.description: Create a reusable theme toggle button with icons
instructions: This creates a button that shows Sun icon in dark mode and Moon icon in light mode
Uses lucide-react for icons (install if not present: npm install lucide-react)

step4.title: Add Toggle Button to Navbar
step4.description: Place the theme toggle button in your navbar
instructions: Add <ThemeToggle /> in the navbar, typically on the right side
Place it near other action buttons like profile or notifications

step5.title: Configure Tailwind for Dark Mode
step5.description: Ensure Tailwind CSS is configured for dark mode
instructions: This allows toggling dark mode via the 'dark' class on the root element

step6.title: Update Components with Dark Mode Styles
step6.description: Add dark mode variants to your existing components
instructions: Go through your components and add dark: variants
Test each page to ensure readability in both themes

testingChecklist: Click the theme toggle button in navbar
Verify page switches from dark to light theme smoothly
Click again to switch back to dark theme
Refresh the page and verify theme persists
Check all pages (landing, dashboard, profile, etc.)
Verify text is readable in both themes
Check that buttons and cards look good in both themes
Verify smooth transition animations between themes

commonIssues.solution: Check if ThemeToggle component is properly imported and added to Navbar
Verify ThemeProvider wraps the entire app and tailwind.config.js has darkMode: 'class'
Check if localStorage is being used correctly in ThemeContext
Add dark: variants to those component's Tailwind classes

finalNotes: The theme preference is saved in localStorage
Users will see their preferred theme on return visits
The toggle uses smooth CSS transitions for a polished feel
Sun icon appears in dark mode (click to go light)
Moon icon appears in light mode (click to go dark)
